_schema.description: Monthly humanitarian aid delivery volume, FY 2024 (simulated). Twelve categories mapped to angular positions on a polar axis. Replace with any single-series categorical dataset where the circular layout has semantic meaning (months, compass directions, hours of day). Avoid using a radial bar chart for datasets where the circular wrap-around carries no meaning — a regular bar chart will be more honest.

fields.data[].month: string, category label — mapped to angular band
fields.data[].value: number, quantity — encoded as bar length (radial extent) from innerRadius

_schema.replace: Swap 'month' and 'value' fields. Keep 12 or fewer categories — above 12, individual bars become too narrow to read. The angular band scale and radial linear scale recalibrate automatically.
